summary: High‑energy June 12 1992 show shines with a scorching Scarlet > Fire sequence; soundboard is solid though some listeners prefer the audience mix.
review: Fans rave about this 6/12/92 concert, calling it one of the best of the ’90s thanks to blistering Jerry solos, killer midi‑horn guitar jams on Scarlet > Fire and a flawless flow into China Doll and Sugar Magnolia. The soundboard source is generally clear and well‑balanced, but a few reviewers note speed or gain quirks and suggest the audience (AUD) version for extra punch.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviews are 5‑star praising performance; mixed but mostly positive comments on recording quality keep the rating just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard is clear and well‑balanced; some listeners report speed issues on the SBD and gain spikes during Jack Straw, while the audience (AUD) version is praised for its punchy, ambient feel.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert maintains relentless momentum with seamless transitions—especially the fiery Scarlet > Fire and the uplifting China Doll into Sugar Magnolia—making it one of the band’s top ’92 performances.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for shredding solos and his midi‑horn guitar jams during Scarlet > Fire.
band_member_comments.Keys: Vince’s keyboard work is highlighted as a standout, delivering strong organ/piano textures throughout.
